reason: Verified that the agent can use GitHub tools to identify the user and return their GitHub username after requesting and granting access.
steps: Navigated to http://localhost:47891 - Application loaded successfully, showing the sidebar with available agents.
Found and clicked the "QA-20260401-015808-la9h" agent in the sidebar - Agent page loaded with "idle" status.
Verified agent status is "idle" - Status indicator correctly displayed as "idle".
Sent message: "Use the GitHub tool to check who I am. Tell me my GitHub username." - Message was successfully submitted and agent transitioned to "working" status.
GitHub account access request card appeared - Card displayed with options to select GitHub account and grant access. Selected the GitHub checkbox and clicked "Grant Access" button.
Waited for agent processing - Agent executed the following workflow:
Agent returned response with GitHub username - Final response clearly states: "Your GitHub username is yiw190." The agent worked for 1m 26s and returned to "idle" status.
Verified response includes GitHub username and took final screenshot - Screenshot shows the complete conversation with the GitHub username "yiw190" prominently displayed in the response.
